if.if: AND (content LIKE CONCAT('%', CONCAT(#{keyword}, '%')) OR commenter LIKE CONCAT('%',CONCAT( #{keyword}, '%')))

mapper.select: SELECT count(board_no) FROM BOARD_COMMENT WHERE board_no > 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BOARD_COMMENT(comment_no, board_no, commenter, content) VALUES(BOARD_COMMENT_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{board_no} ,#{commenter}, #{content})
mapper.select:
SELECT board_no, title, content, writer, reg_date FROM ( SELECT board_no, title, content, writer, reg_date, rownum rnum FROM ( SELECT board_no, title, content, writer, reg_date FROM board WHERE board_no > 0
ORDER BY board_no DESC ) )
WHERE board_no > 0
